title: poliomintha bustamanta
intro: Poliomintha bustamanta, also known as Mexican mint marigold, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poliomintha bustamanta include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy among indigenous communities. Poliomintha bustamanta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
